docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Progress

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Progress do use Phoenix.Component attr :value, :integer, default: 0 attr :max, :integer, default: 100 attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global def progress(assigns) do pct = if assigns.max > 0, do: round(assigns.value / assigns.max * 100), else: 0 assigns = assign(assigns, :pct, pct) ~H"""
""" end end

name: progress
title: Progress
